understanding.goal_understanding: The goal of the game was to reach the goal gem tile marked '+', avoiding hazards such as spike tiles and making use of the available movement and interactions within a limited number of turns.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement was strictly horizontal (MOVE_LEFT and MOVE_RIGHT), after which gravity would automatically move the player vertically in the direction of gravity until hitting a solid tile, hazard, or goal. Clicking (CLICK) could be used to remove breakable blocks, thus opening up new fall paths, without advancing the turn counter. Undo (UNDO) would revert the last action. Landing on spike tiles would immediately end the run.

Agent explained goal and mechanics.

understanding.goal_understanding: The goal of the game was to reach the goal gem tile marked '+', avoiding hazards such as spike tiles and making use of the available movement and interactions within a limited number of turns.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement was strictly horizontal (MOVE_LEFT and MOVE_RIGHT), after which gravity would automatically move the player vertically in the direction of gravity until hitting a solid tile, hazard, or goal. Clicking (CLICK) could be used to remove breakable blocks, thus opening up new fall paths, without advancing the turn counter. Undo (UNDO) would revert the last action. Landing on spike tiles would immediately end the run.
